prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game UI background
Primary request: old dossier paper and black-and-white illustrated home screen background for Reborn as Livestock, a dark humor animal life simulator. Farm, kennel, pasture silhouettes in distance, dog near foreground, aged paper frame.
Style/medium: grayscale storybook concept art, old archive UI, ink wash, subtle pencil texture
Composition/framing: 16:9 landscape, central area usable for title and buttons, decorative border, no readable text
Lighting/mood: nostalgic, slightly absurd, warm paper contrast
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo, no modern mobile UI chrome

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game UI screen illustration
Primary request: fate rebirth wheel for an animal life simulator, circular archive device with paw-print center, animal symbols, environment icons, paper texture.
Style/medium: grayscale old dossier UI, hand-drawn ink, lightly embossed paper, black-and-white storybook
Composition/framing: 16:9 landscape, centered circular wheel, clean margins for UI buttons, no readable text
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game animal selection card
Primary request: vertical archive card illustration of a warm family dog, expressive eyes, remembers the world through smell, old paper border.
Style/medium: black-and-white illustrated card, ink and pencil, old photo print, subtle paper grain
Composition/framing: portrait card, dog centered, room for UI labels added later, no readable text
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo

Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo
